mapper.select: select id, project_id, user_id, role, joined_at from project_member where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select id, project_id, user_id, role, joined_at from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
select id, project_id, user_id, role, joined_at from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into project_member (project_id, user_id, role, joined_at) values (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{role}, now())
mapper.update: update project_member set role = #{role} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update project_member set deleted = 1 where project_id = #{projectId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and role = 'admin' and deleted = 0
select count(*) from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
